form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Maryborough on March 30. Before that, 7th (Fr6) over 2180m after showing early speed at Terang beaten 50 m by Coltrane (2:46.40) in 0-1 WIN on March 27 at $31. Genuine chance.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2180m at Terang, beaten 35 m by Coltrane (2:46.40) in 0-1 WIN on March 27 at $51. Before that, 7th (FT Fr1) over 2190m at this track beaten 12 m by Lady Suspicious (2:57.80) in NR up to 59 on March 14 at $21. Genuine chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten 48m into 6th place.
Out of position when the start was effected.
Tired over the concluding stages to be beaten 97m into 10th place.
Broke after the start. Trailed the field and was beaten 86m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into fourth behind Feel The Moment at this track over 2190m in a No NR on December 30 at $21. Solid top-three claims.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr6) over 1690m at Maryborough beaten 30 m by Playa Del Carmen (2:07.00) in NR up to 36 on March 30 at $12. At the run before 6th (FT Fr4) over 2570m at Ararat, beaten 45 m by Kamaran (3:23.50) in No NR on March 23 at $61. Sure to be very competitive.

Began badly.
Held up for a clear run until approaching 200m.
Began badly when galloping away.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1690m after showing early pace at Maryborough beaten 25 m by Playa Del Carmen (2:07.00) in NR up to 36 on March 30 at $4.50. The run before surrendered the lead and finished 8th (FT Fr1) over 2570m at Ararat beaten 45 m by Kamaran (3:23.50) in No NR on March 23 at $13. Expecting a spike in form this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Finished seventh at his last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 65 metres behind Buslin Brody at Kilmore over 2180m NR up to 49 on February 26. Not out of the equation.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh after being driven well back, behind Piesridingshotgun at Maryborough over 2190m in a NR 48 to 52 on March 30 at $41. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 2nd (20m Fr2) over 2570m at Ararat beaten 35 m by Kamaran (3:23.50) in No NR on March 23 at $13. Strong winning prospects.
